new_information: The Issues folder now includes a canonical top-level kanban snapshot file, and local agent instructions require keeping `kanban.md` up to date when issue status or priority changes affect the board view.
impact_on_existing_information: The current interpretation of this folder now includes a maintained board-level status summary in addition to per-issue records. Issue lifecycle updates should be reflected both in individual issue files and in `kanban.md` so readers can rely on the top-level snapshot as the current execution view.
